parameters.query:
WITH resolved AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    NULLIF($1::text, '')::int,
    (SELECT id FROM barberias WHERE slug = NULLIF($2::text, '') LIMIT 1)
  ) AS barberia_id
), upd_barberia AS (
  UPDATE barberias b
  SET
    nombre = COALESCE(NULLIF($3::text, ''), b.nombre),
    slug = COALESCE(NULLIF($2::text, ''), b.slug),
    logo_url = COALESCE(NULLIF($4::text, ''), b.logo_url),
    cover_url = COALESCE(NULLIF($5::text, ''), b.cover_url),
    ciudad = COALESCE(NULLIF($6::text, ''), b.ciudad),
    direccion = COALESCE(NULLIF($7::text, ''), b.direccion),
    telefono = COALESCE(NULLIF($8::text, ''), b.telefono)
  FROM resolved r
  WHERE b.id = r.barberia_id
  RETURNING b.id
), upd_theme AS (
  UPDATE barberia_theme t
  SET
    primary_color = COALESCE(NULLIF($9::text, ''), t.primary_color),
    secondary_color = COALESCE(NULLIF($10::text, ''), t.secondary_color),
    background_color = COALESCE(NULLIF($11::text, ''), t.background_color),
    text_color = COALESCE(NULLIF($12::text, ''), t.text_color)
  WHERE t.barberia_id = (SELECT id FROM upd_barberia LIMIT 1)
  RETURNING t.barberia_id
), ins_theme AS (
  INSERT INTO barberia_theme (barberia_id, primary_color, secondary_color, background_color, text_color)
  SELECT id, NULLIF($9::text, ''), NULLIF($10::text, ''), NULLIF($11::text, ''), NULLIF($12::text, '')
  FROM upd_barberia
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upd_theme)
), existing_asset AS (
  SELECT a.id
  FROM barberia_assets a
  JOIN upd_barberia u ON u.id = a.barberia_id
  WHERE a.tipo = 'other'
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.orden = 999 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
), upd_asset AS (
  UPDATE barberia_assets a
  SET url = $13::text, orden = 999, activo = true
  WHERE a.id IN (SELECT id FROM existing_asset)
  RETURNING a.id
), ins_asset AS (
  INSERT INTO barberia_assets (barberia_id, tipo, url, orden, activo)
  SELECT id, 'other', $13::text, 999, true
  FROM upd_barberia
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upd_asset)
  RETURNING barberia_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT id FROM upd_barberia LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT barberia_id FROM ins_asset LIMIT 1)
) AS barberia_id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: !!$json.barberia_id, message: $json.barberia_id ? "Landing guardada en BD." : "No se encontro barberia para guardar.", barberia_id: $json.barberia_id || null } }}

  (SELECT id FROM upd_barberia LIMIT 1),
